channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire over and talks a waste of time
item.description: President Trump said the ceasefire with Iran is over and that negotiations are a waste of time, though talks may continue.

item.title: The Trump effect: Why Democrats embraced a Platner time bomb
item.description: Graham Platner was a ticking time bomb long before the rape allegation he denied this week, with a Nazi tattoo and social media rants.

item.title: Why Obamacare premiums are set for another double-digit jump
item.description: Obamacare coverage costs are expected to rise by a median of 14% next year, signaling continued instability for the law's marketplaces.

item.title: Exclusive: Republicans juice spending to protect Senate "red wall"
item.description: Republicans are significantly increasing campaign spending on Senate races in red states that were previously considered safe from Democratic challenges.
